name: kuira-wp-core
description: Core WordPress plugin development for Claude Code — the /wp-new wizard, scaffolding (React/Vue/vanilla), secure REST/AJAX and custom-table generators, Gutenberg blocks, UI/visual routing, always-on WPCS context, and the safety hooks. Start here.
author: Mohammad Limon Mia

recommends.superpowers: obra/superpowers — install for the wp-ui-visual visual companion
recommends.kuira-wp-quality: add for testing, static analysis, and security auditing
